name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for visiting Bright Smile — mind sharing how it went?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks so much for coming in to Bright Smile Dental. We know the dentist isn't everyone's favourite errand, so it genuinely means a lot that you trusted us with your visit.

If you have 30 seconds, a quick honest review helps other nervous patients find a practice where they can feel at ease:

https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review

And if anything about your visit didn't feel right, please just hit reply — we'd much rather hear it from you directly so we can make it better.

Take care,
The team at Bright Smile Dental
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick nudge in case our email got buried. If you've got 30 seconds, a short review really helps: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. Thanks!

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://g.page/r/Ca-example-business/review. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
